title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama CLI and server that lets you run Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally with minimal setup.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for the Ollama server; install via npm.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; pip-installable wrapper around the REST API.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration that lets you plug any Ollama-hosted model into LangChain pipelines.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (ChatGPT-style interface) built with SvelteKit.

title: ollama4j
summary: Unofficial Java SDK for Ollama; stream or block on chat, generate, and embed endpoints.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Community-maintained Ruby gem wrapping the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-cli (deno)
summary: Lightweight Deno CLI for chatting with Ollama models from the terminal.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Experimental VS Code extension that turns any Ollama model into a GitHub Copilot replacement.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration enabling Ollama models as Generators or Embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official Docker image and compose files for running Ollama server containerized with GPU support.

title: ollama-chat-telegram
summary: Self-hostable Telegram bot that proxies chats to your local Ollama instance.

title: ollama-k8s
summary: Minimal Helm chart and Kubernetes manifests for deploying Ollama with GPU plugins.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: Unofficial C# .NET client for Ollama with async streaming and strongly-typed responses.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Slack Bolt app that adds /ollama slash command to query local models securely.

title: ollama-express-bridge
summary: Tiny Express middleware that exposes an OpenAI-compatible completions endpoint backed by Ollama.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Python-based Discord.py bot enabling servers to chat with Ollama models via slash commands.

title: ollama-nim-client
summary: Pure Nim client library for Ollama supporting sync, async, and streaming APIs.

title: ollama-logseq
summary: Logseq plugin that brings local LLM summarization and Q&A to your knowledge base.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian community plugin to run Ollama models for note summarization and brainstorming.
